description.en: Unofficial, non-standard workaround for the YouTube video background "Sign in to confirm you're not a bot" prompt. It rewrites youtube-nocookie.com embeds to youtube.com. This is not an ivLyrics-supported path; disable this addon first when debugging video issues, and contact ivLyrics developers only if the issue still reproduces without it.
description.zh-CN: 非官方、非标准实现的临时绕行方案，用于尝试缓解 YouTube 视频背景出现“请登录，以便我们确认你不是聊天机器人”的问题。它会将 youtube-nocookie.com 嵌入改为 youtube.com。这不是 ivLyrics 官方支持或推荐的实现路径；排查视频相关问题时请先关闭本插件，关闭后仍能复现再联系 ivLyrics 开发者。
